title: Velociraptor Running in Prehistoric Forest Coloring Page
seoTitle: Medium Velociraptor Running Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this free medium velociraptor coloring sheet. Perfect for kids and dinosaur enthusiasts with crisp outlines and detailed forest background.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Contrary to its human-sized depiction in films, Velociraptor Running in Prehistoric Forest was about the size of a turkey, weighing around 33 pounds (15 kg).
Velociraptor Running in Prehistoric Forest possessed a sharp, 3-inch curved claw on the second toe of each foot, used to slash and capture prey.
